name: remediation
description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
sprintGoal: GGE G5 passes in orient: the planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute
stories.description: Golden Goose Egg G5 indicator is failing. Indicator type: gate_passing. Restore it immediately. Rationale: The plan ceremony cannot run without a pending increment in manifest.json. When all increments complete, the machine stalls silently — no error, no alert, just nothing to plan. This egg catches that stall state immediately. First triggered when increment 9 completed with no successor increment defined.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes in orient
stories.testPlan: Run the orient ceremony: bash scripts/ralph/ceremonies/orient.sh. Confirm GGE G5 shows PASS (no FAIL line for G5). Alternatively: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); incs=m.get('increments',[]); pending=[i for i in incs if i.get('status')=='pending']; print('PASS' if pending or m.get('activeSprint') else 'FAIL')"

smart.notes: Specific score 3: the story does not name which file to modify or what exact change to make. The test plan implies adding an increment with status=pending to prd/manifest.json, but this must be inferred — no file path, field name, or example diff is provided.

stories.readinessNote: Priority-0 ANDON — included in sprint despite SMART gate ejection. Readiness gaps: missing testPlan (added at planning), branchName uses fix/ prefix instead of feature/. Fix: orient ceremony must show GGE G5 = PASS after this story is accepted.
